description.en: Each statement in __future__.py is of the form: FeatureName = _Feature(OptionalRelease, MandatoryRelease, CompilerFlag) where, normally, OptionalRelease is less than MandatoryRelease, and both are 5-tuples of the same form as sys.version_info: (PY_MAJOR_VERSION, # the 2 in 2.1.0a3; an int PY_MINOR_VERSION, # the 1; an int PY_MICRO_VERSION, # the 0; an int PY_RELEASE_LEVEL, # "alpha", "beta", "candidate" or "final"; string PY_RELEASE_SERIAL # the 3; an int )
